authorization_modes.authorized-local-export: User selects or provides a local export, folder, ZIP, workbook, saved page, or read-only copied file.
authorization_modes.authorized-mailbox-or-export: User registers a mailbox through password_env or provides a local email export.
authorization_modes.browser-history-or-export: User provides a copied browser history database or a platform usage export.
authorization_modes.lake-lens: FinClaw runs the lens only after the upstream collector has written authorized Lake events.
authorization_modes.local-database-readonly: User authorizes a local application data store or decrypted/readable database path.
authorization_modes.local-scan-readonly: Collector scans a user-authorized local application or filesystem scope without mutation.
authorization_modes.local-ui-readonly: User logs in and unlocks the local application; collector reads visible/local data without order mutation.
authorization_modes.managed-oauth-snapshot: FinClaw-managed OAuth or equivalent connection is completed before scheduled snapshot collection.

product_surfaces.guarded-production: May be exposed as a guarded user-facing collector after the stated preflight is satisfied.
product_surfaces.deep-beta: May be exposed to beta users with explicit caveats and gap states.
product_surfaces.import-beta: May be exposed as an authorized import or local-scan beta collector.
product_surfaces.lens-beta: May be exposed only as a downstream lens after its upstream Lake exists.
product_surfaces.managed-oauth-beta: May be exposed after managed authorization infrastructure is available.
product_surfaces.supporting-beta: May support investor workflows but is not a primary investor P0/P1/P2 source.

evidence_roles.attention-universe: Self-selected symbols, watchlists, follows, or attention pools that must be corroborated by trades, holdings, notes, or research.
evidence_roles.information-usage: User reading, search, subscription, alert, or information-source traces.
evidence_roles.investor-lens: Filtered investment evidence derived from upstream personal Lake events.
evidence_roles.partial-asset-facts: Authorized asset or wealth facts that remain partial until full account boundary validation.
evidence_roles.personal-channel-lake: Generic personal channel evidence that should enter Lake before investor lens classification.
evidence_roles.planning-context: Task, calendar, reminder, or planning evidence for trade/research discipline.
evidence_roles.research-material: Authorized research-document evidence and explicit content extraction outputs.
evidence_roles.strong-trade-asset-facts: Broker or trading-app facts such as assets, positions, executions, orders, and fund flows.
evidence_roles.supporting-communication: Supporting communication evidence that needs an investor lens before Wiki use.
evidence_roles.weak-influence: Weak social influence evidence that requires corroboration and cannot stand alone as an investment conclusion.
evidence_roles.workflow-metadata: Professional terminal workflow metadata without vendor database or licensed content mirroring.
evidence_roles.workflow-metadata-and-intensity: Professional terminal workflow metadata plus query/export/object-count intensity summaries without vendor database or licensed content mirroring.

contracts.user_step: Log in to EastMoney and unlock the trading page; CollectorX reads local files and visible trading tables only.
contracts.preflight: EastMoney is installed, the user is logged in, and the read-only trading UI can be reached.

contracts.user_step: Authorize a local Tonghuashun scan or open an unlocked read-only trading screen.
contracts.preflight: Tonghuashun local data or visible trading UI is available without requesting a trading password.

contracts.user_step: Authorize a local Tonghuashun data root for read-only watchlist scanning; exported files can still be imported through --input as a fallback.
contracts.preflight: The root or export is user-owned Tonghuashun watchlist evidence and not a trade, holding, order, or fund-flow source.

contracts.user_step: Authorize local WeChat collection and provide required readable database/key preconditions.
contracts.preflight: WeChat local store is readable for the supported platform; no decrypted keys are written to output.

contracts.user_step: Run after WeChat Lake exists, optionally narrowing to user-approved chats or senders.
contracts.preflight: Upstream wechat events.jsonl exists and source-policy allow/deny rules are explicit when used.

contracts.user_step: Select an authorized root folder for metadata-only scanning.
contracts.preflight: Root exists and the user understands file bodies are not read by the generic collector.

contracts.user_step: Run on authorized research folders or upstream file/note Lake events; content extraction requires explicit flags.
contracts.preflight: Research inputs are user-selected, and body/OCR extraction choices are explicit.

contracts.user_step: Register an IMAP account through password_env, authorize a local mailbox root for read-only scanning, or provide a local email export.
contracts.preflight: Mailbox credentials are referenced by environment variable, or a user-owned local mail root/export is selected.

contracts.user_step: Run after email Lake exists to classify broker research, morning meetings, roadshows, IR mail, earnings alerts, and attachment signals.
contracts.preflight: Upstream email events.jsonl exists; full-body Wiki inclusion and attachment-body collection remain false by default.

contracts.user_step: Provide an authorized Xueqiu watchlist export or package.
contracts.preflight: Input is a user-owned Xueqiu watchlist export; it is not treated as broker holdings.

contracts.user_step: Provide an authorized Xueqiu activity export, ZIP, saved page, workbook, browser-network HAR, or copied Chromium/Safari browser history file.
contracts.preflight: Input belongs to the user; HAR parsing excludes request secrets, browser-history parsing is domain-filtered to xueqiu.com, and neither path is treated as broker trade evidence.

contracts.user_step: Provide authorized fund, wealth, cash-management, bank wealth, workbook, ZIP, or HAR exports.
contracts.preflight: Input is read-only and user-owned; passwords and account mutation are out of scope.

contracts.user_step: Provide authorized meeting minutes, transcripts, subtitles, platform exports, or ZIP packages; optionally choose source-platform, participant, and keyword allow/deny scope filters.
contracts.preflight: Meeting artifact files are user-selected; optional scope filters are applied before Lake output; attachment/recording bodies are not assumed.

contracts.user_step: Provide authorized DingTalk collaboration exports or ZIP packages; optionally choose source-platform, record-kind, chat, sender, participant, and keyword allow/deny scope filters.
contracts.preflight: Input is user-authorized; optional scope filters are applied before Lake output; credentials and file bodies are excluded unless explicitly handled by another collector.

contracts.user_step: Provide authorized WeCom collaboration exports or ZIP packages; optionally choose source-platform, record-kind, chat, sender, participant, and keyword allow/deny scope filters.
contracts.preflight: Input is user-authorized; optional scope filters are applied before Lake output; credentials and file bodies are excluded unless explicitly handled by another collector.

contracts.user_step: Provide authorized Feishu exports or use the registered read-only Feishu tooling where available.
contracts.preflight: Workspace scope is user-authorized and tenant/app secrets are not written to output.

contracts.user_step: Run after meeting or collaboration Lake exists to classify investment meetings and decision surfaces.
contracts.preflight: Upstream meeting/collaboration events.jsonl exists and recording-body authorization is explicit if used.

contracts.user_step: Provide an authorized note vault, Notion/Youdao/Evernote export, table export, or ZIP package; optionally provide source-app, path/notebook, or tag allow/deny filters.
contracts.preflight: Input is user-selected; note source-policy filters are applied before Lake output when provided; full-content inclusion remains explicit.

contracts.user_step: Run after notes Lake exists to classify investment reviews, rules, checklists, and valuation assumptions.
contracts.preflight: Upstream notes events.jsonl exists and note allowlists are applied when needed.

contracts.user_step: Connect TickTick/Dida through FinClaw-managed OAuth before scheduled SoulMirror snapshots run; for offline authorized exports, optionally provide source-app, project/list, tag, or keyword allow/deny filters.
contracts.preflight: Managed OAuth broker or token environment is available; collection path does not start OAuth itself; offline task scope filters are applied before package output when provided.

contracts.user_step: Provide authorized calendar ICS, JSON, CSV, TSV, or ZIP exports; optionally provide source-platform, calendar, attendee, or keyword allow/deny filters.
contracts.preflight: Calendar input is user-selected; calendar scope filters are applied before Lake output when provided; time-quality checks run when enough time fields exist.

contracts.user_step: Run after task or calendar Lake exists to classify investment plans, review reminders, and research tasks.
contracts.preflight: Upstream task/calendar events.jsonl exists; scope-policy audits, timezone/recurrence caveats, and task/calendar boundary proof are visible.

contracts.user_step: Provide authorized WeChat favorites, saved article files, folders, or ZIP packages; optionally choose source-account, account-type, action, tag, domain, and keyword allow/deny scope filters.
contracts.preflight: Input is user-selected; optional scope filters are applied before Lake output and do not imply public-account platform-wide scraping.

contracts.user_step: Run after WeChat favorites Lake exists to classify investment articles and reading actions.
contracts.preflight: Upstream favorites events.jsonl exists and account/tag allowlists are explicit when used.

contracts.user_step: Provide authorized finance-news usage exports, saved pages, ZIP packages, copied browser history, or ZIP-packaged History.db members; optionally choose platform, action, source-app, domain, topic, or keyword allow/deny filters.
contracts.preflight: Only CLS, WallstreetCN, Gelonghui, or whitelisted finance-news usage traces are parsed; browser-history inputs are domain-filtered and source-app counted; optional scope filters are applied before Lake output and can return scope_policy_filtered_all.

contracts.user_step: Provide authorized read-only Futu, Tiger, or IBKR statements, exports, workbooks, or ZIP packages.
contracts.preflight: Brokerage input is read-only and user-owned; no order mutation or trading password is requested.

contracts.user_step: Provide authorized Wind, Choice, iFinD, or Bloomberg workflow metadata exports with available query, export, workspace, template, dataset, and field metadata.
contracts.preflight: Input contains personal workflow metadata and workflow intensity metadata only, not vendor database mirrors or licensed content bodies.

contracts.user_step: Provide authorized Weibo, Bilibili, or Xiaohongshu activity exports, saved pages, workbooks, ZIP packages, or copied Chromium/Safari browser history files.
contracts.preflight: Social traces and browser-history copies are domain-filtered weak influence only and cannot become standalone investment conclusions.

contracts.user_step: Run after social activity Lake exists and use the output only as weak influence evidence.
contracts.preflight: Upstream social-activity events.jsonl exists and stronger trade/research corroboration is still required.

contracts.user_step: Authorize a local readable or decrypted QQ NT store before running the supporting communication collector.
contracts.preflight: QQ database path is readable; passphrases and decrypted keys are not written to output.
